title: North-Eastern Hill University Result 2026: Latest PG Results Declared on 13 February

detail.title: North-Eastern Hill University Result 2026: Latest PG Results Declared on 13 February
detail.short_info: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has released PG results for Garo, MBA, and Food Technology semesters on 13 February 2026. Access official PDFs and check your result online now.

sections.heading: North-Eastern Hill University Result 2026: Latest PG Results Declared on 13 February

content.text: North-Eastern Hill University (NEHU) has declared several postgraduate (PG) semester results on 13 February 2026. Students from the affected batches can now access their results through the official examination portal. These include re-appear and regular examinations held in previous sessions.
The following postgraduate results were uploaded on 13 February 2026. All results are available as PDFs on the official NEHU examination website.

rows: Result of Garo 1st Semester Re-Appear (22 Batch)
Result of MBA (General Management) METAS 4th Semester Re-Appear (Batch 2022)
Result of Food Technology 2nd Semester (Regular 24 Batch)

content.text: These results are provisional. Students should verify details with their departments if needed.

sections.heading: How to Check and Download NEHU Result 2026 Online

content.text: Follow these simple steps to access your result:

items: Visit the official NEHU examination portal: Click Here
Scroll through the list of recently declared results.
Click on the relevant result link (displayed with upload date).
The PDF will open or download automatically.
Search for your roll number using Ctrl+F (or Command+F on Mac) to find your marks/grade.

content.text: Always use the official NEHU website to avoid fraudulent sources. No login or registration is required for these PDF results.

sections.heading: Next Steps After Checking Your NEHU Result

content.text: If you have cleared the semester, collect your marksheet from your department when notified. In case of any discrepancy or if you need to improve your grades:

items: Contact your department head or the examination branch promptly.
Watch the official NEHU website for notifications on revaluation, scrutiny, or supplementary examinations (typically announced within 2-4 weeks of result declaration).
Keep checking Click Here for updates on remaining 2026 semester results.
